final_prompt.prompt:
Create a scene illustration of a post-apocalyptic wasteland environment (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "末日废土" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Mad Max: Fury Road production design, 1990s Japanese mecha anime background art, 1970s dystopian sci-fi paperback cover illustration; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a modified armored vehicle as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: must include a desolate desert landscape, collapsed city ruins in the distance, yellow-tinged sky, sandstorm atmosphere
Lighting/mood: needs a tense post-apocalyptic survival atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a desolate yellow-tinged direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a dusty, weathered surface treatment — exact grain / rust / sand texture is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
